name: Greek Sour Cherry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit the cherries and place the pits in a separate bowl.
2. Layer the cherries in a saucepan with sugar.
3. Add water to the pits and stir, then drain and use this water to add to the cherries in the saucepan.
4. Let the mixture stand for 1 hour.
5. Gently boil over low heat for 30 minutes until the syrup thickens. Stir occasionally and skim off any scum that rises to the surface.
6. Add the lemon juice at the end of the 30 minutes.
7. Cool and store covered in the refrigerator.
Serve spoonfuls of the preserve as a sauce with visitors or over ice cream as a dessert.
